PATRON.title: Find Your Vibe
PATRON.content: Browse through South Africa's top venues and festivals. Select where you are to see the menu.

PATRON.title: Skip the Queue
PATRON.content: Order your drinks directly from your phone. No more waiting at the bar.

PATRON.title: Party Smart
PATRON.content: Keep track of your spending with the Party Statement budget tracker.

BARTENDER.title: Incoming Orders
BARTENDER.content: All orders from patrons appear here in real-time. Speed is key!

BARTENDER.title: Manage Progress
BARTENDER.content: Mark drinks as 'In Progress' so patrons know you're on it.

BARTENDER.title: Notify Patron
BARTENDER.content: Trigger 'Collection Ready' notifications to let patrons know their drinks are ready.

MANAGER.title: Real-time Metrics
MANAGER.content: Monitor your revenue, volume, and peak hours at a glance.

MANAGER.title: Menu Management
MANAGER.content: Update your menu, stock levels, and pricing in seconds.

MANAGER.title: Consumer Insights
MANAGER.content: View the Consumer Behavior Data Feed to understand your audience better.
